title: Charles Schwab (SCHW)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Charles Schwab using actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what SCHW is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
">
Schwab faced "cash sorting" headwinds as interest rates rose, hurting Net Interest Revenue. We model 8% growth assuming these headwinds subside and the underlying asset management and trading businesses resume their steady, compounding growth trajectory.

discountRate.rationale:

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
